Video.summary: Debbie is in for a shocking surprise when she catches her boyfriend, Terrance, sneaking around with her twin sister.
Video.title: Young vs. Goodwin

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: Sable suspects girlfriend Mechelle of giving extra during her massage practice and petitions her to take a polygraph test.
Video.title: Myers vs. Crossland

Video.summary: A paternity test will determine the fate of Keith and Rochelle's relationship after questions arise from her ex's family.
Video.title: Jordan vs. Dawson

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: A once-thriving relationship teeters on the edge as accusations of infidelity and neglect come to light in court.
Video.title: Osborne vs. Osborne

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: The limits of polyamorous-turned-monogamous couple Ericka and Rashaad are tested when a surprise witness drops a bomb.
Video.title: Calhoun vs. Sowell

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: After calling off their wedding, Smilez sues Dejsha for crashing his music video and breaking his $12,000 chain.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Watson

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: The results of a polygraph test will reveal if webcam star and sugar baby Andrea has been cheating on her boyfriend, Justin.
Video.title: Stephens vs. Harris

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: Professional dominatrix Sasha brings her boyfriend, Perrance, to court in hope of spicing up their relationship.
Video.title: Bryer vs. Williams

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: An unpaid loan brings a woman and her grandson's ex-girlfriend to court; a woman regrets agreeing to take out a loan for her ex-boyfriend.
Video.title: Loanly Regrets

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: Malu sues her girlfriend, L'Mika, because she failed to repay her for a loan and, instead, went on a cruise without her.
Video.title: Mejilla vs. Kargbo

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: Terran delivers an ultimatum after he suspects girlfriend Nia of cheating based on her sexually explicit rap lyrics.
Video.title: Eaton vs. Henderson

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: After eight years together, Krystal's pregnancy sparks doubts about her fiancé's addictions and honesty, demanding clarity before marriage.
Video.title: Simmons vs. Stephens

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: A surprise witness and a bombshell reveal blow the lid off Joshua's property-damage claim against girlfriend Tonya.
Video.title: Brown vs. Bell

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Breon issues his girlfriend, Chenika, an ultimatum regarding her refusal to have another baby and grow their family of nine to 10.
Video.title: Holland vs. Bryant

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: A father's doubt and a mother's plea collide in court over paternity, love and a baby's future.
Video.title: Willis vs. Hagans

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Rachel must answer for delaying her nuptials to fiance Blaine after he stuck with her through her prison stint.
Video.title: Cerre vs. Hardy

Video.summary: A shocking witness and the results of a DNA test determine the future of Mafi and Athena's tumultuous relationship.
Video.title: Knighton vs. Carrillo

Video.summary: Keith wants his girlfriend, Jacey, to take a polygraph test because he suspects she cheated with an older customer at her job.
Video.title: Fitchpatrick vs. Gray

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: Damage to personal items, theft of a dog, and unpaid rent have exes fighting.
Video.title: Bey vs. Williams

Video.summary: Choreographer Bryant sues ex-girlfriend and R&B artist Olivia for non-payment of services rendered for a music video.
Video.title: Huey vs. Walker

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers
